Sport|Football

The draw for the 2024Paris Olympicsis about to take place for both the men’s and women’s tournaments.

Brazil have failed to qualify to defend their men’s gold medal while Canada are out to retain the women’s crown, afterTeam GBmissed out on a spot due to their early exit from the Nations League.

A total of 16 teams will be split into four groups for the men’s tournament while the women’s will divide 12 teams into three groups, meaning the best two third-placed teams will qualify for the knockouts.

As per usual, the men’sOlympicsteams will be predominantly made up of players under the age of 23 with no restrictions on the women’s squads.

TheOlympic footballdraw takes place tonight, Wednesday March 20, 2024 in the Pulse building which is the headquarters of the Paris Games.

It is set to begin a 7pm GMT.

Men’s

Pot 1

Pot 2

Pot 3

Pot 4

Three Asian nations, plus a play-off between the fourth-placed team at the U23 Asian Cup and fourth-placed team at the U23 Africa Cup of Nations, Guinea, will decide the final four spots.

Women’s

Pot 1

Pot 2

Pot 3

Pot 4

Two African nations will qualify in April’s play-offs, which see South Africa face Nigeria and Zambia take on Morocco.

TV channel and live stream:The draw will be broadcast live and for free online via the FIFA+ streaming service.

The schedule is already set for both tournaments with the first group games being held on Wednesday, July 24 and Thursday, July 25. The men’s final takes place on Friday, August 9 and the women’s on Saturday, August 10.
